scripts.link:e2e-user: set -a && . ../../apps/web/.env && set +a && bun -e "const id = process.env.E2E_CLERK_USER_ID; if (!id) { console.error('E2E_CLERK_USER_ID not set in apps/web/.env'); process.exit(1); } const {PrismaClient} = await import('@prisma/client'); const db = new PrismaClient(); const r = await db.person.update({ where: { id: 'person-alice' }, data: { clerkUserId: id }, select: { id: true, firstName: true, clerkUserId: true } }); console.log('linked:', r); await db.\$disconnect();"
